programs.title: Teen Titans Go!
programs.desc: When he isn't invited to Beast Boy's birthday party, Robin throws his own party, with special guest Bob Uecker.

programs.title: Teen Titans Go!
programs.desc: Robin convinces the Titans to go back to school with him so he can finally become the all-American class president-type he's dreamt of being. Control Freak informs the Titans that they are on a TV show he created and demands they earn him an award. Cyborg's real strength comes not from his robot parts, but from his favourite song. Robin tries to teach the Titans valuable life lessons by reading them fairy tales, but the others co-opt his stories and spin them into their own twisted yarns.

programs.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programs.desc: As Ladybug and Cat Noir face Glaciator again, our heroes don't know that they are about to make a chilling discovery!

programs.title: Tooth Trouble
programs.desc: Puppycorn loses his first tooth and Unikitty's excited for her little bro-- now he​ ​gets a visit from​ ​the​ ​legendary Tooth Fairy!​

programs.title: Pokemon Horizons: The Series
programs.desc: Liko, Roy and Dot investigate a report of Pokémon affected by Laquium.

programs.title: Gg: Spawn Squad
programs.sub_title: Flying Into Kirby Air Riders with Zac!
programs.desc: Zac and Gem take a first look at Kirby Air Riders! Exploring new game mechanics, strange control schemes and epic new courses, this episode has everything you need to know about the new racer!
